title: Step S-SWQT-0008: 双布局发布态消费者与 CI 门禁

items.satisfiedBy: S-SWQT-0007 provides stable browser and static quality commands.

items.problemDefinition: 单一临时消费者不能证明 tarball 在 isolated 与 hoisted 安装策略下都能解析 UI 源、扫描 Tailwind 并产出主题 CSS；本地命令也没有由 CI 持续执行。
items.requirementsDefinition: 将打包消费者验证拆成显式 isolated 与 workspace-hoisted 布局，校验组件 utilities 和 dark selector，并在 push/PR CI 中执行全部质量命令。

recommendedOption.option: Bun --linker isolated + hoisted 的双临时消费者，以及单一 GitHub Actions quality job
recommendedOption.rationale: 显式 linker 使布局差异可重复，CI 复用已验证的根命令。

implementationPlan: 在 isolated 单包消费者与 hoisted workspace 消费者中安装 tarball。
分别 typecheck、build，并断言组件 utilities 和 data-theme=dark 进入 CSS。
添加 CI workflow，顺序执行 typecheck、静态契约、示例构建、浏览器矩阵和双布局验证。

testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: 每个 layout 的 tarball typecheck/build/CSS 断言覆盖发布态消费者；CI YAML 复用这些命令。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: 包解析和 Tailwind source 扫描使用临时真实安装；工作流用 GitHub Actions 在干净 Ubuntu runner 执行。
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 私有 registry 的认证与远端发布仍需由有权限的发布者执行。

readiness.reason: S-SWQT-0007 已提供稳定质量命令，Bun linker 选择与验收断言明确。

items.summary: Added a push/PR quality workflow and converted packed-consumer verification into explicit Bun isolated and workspace-hoisted tarball consumers.
items.result: Both layouts typechecked and built from packed tarballs; emitted CSS contained component utilities and data-theme=dark.

cases.name: Maintainer validates publish-shaped consumers
cases.evidence: Script invokes bun install --linker isolated and --linker hoisted in separate temporary layouts.

cases.name: Pull requests cannot bypass quality gates
cases.evidence: GitHub Actions invokes typecheck, design contract, build, browser matrix, and packed-consumer verification.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Scope is limited to release-shaped consumers, CI, and the linked delivery guide.
Bun packed consumer verification passed in explicit isolated and hoisted layouts; each typechecked, built, and asserted component/dark-theme CSS.
sourceFeature points to F-SWQT-0002 and the delivery guide links the CI workflow and commands.
All required commands are encoded in CI and reusable locally.

items.residualRisk: Private registry authentication and actual remote publishing remain intentionally outside this Step and require maintainer credentials.
items.followUp: Run publish:dry with registry credentials before a real release.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0008-双布局发布态消费者与-ci-门禁.json
items.validationSummary: Packed tarballs passed explicit Bun isolated and workspace-hoisted consumers; CI quality gates are configured.
items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.

items.testCaseSummary: Packed tarballs passed explicit Bun isolated and workspace-hoisted consumers; CI quality gates are configured.

validationSummary: Packed tarballs passed explicit Bun isolated and workspace-hoisted consumers; CI quality gates are configured.
